steps.title: Track the film comparison
steps.content: The passage compares Wendy Carlos's credited work on three films. It says A Clockwork Orange mostly used Beethoven arrangements, almost all of the music for The Shining was unused, and Tron contains the most of Carlos's original compositions.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported claims
steps.content: B reverses the statement about The Shining, since the passage says the director did not use most of that music. C makes an unsupported ranking of Beethoven and Carlos. D is too broad because the passage is about how much original music appeared in the three films. The answer is A.
